Luxury, Comfort & Performance in One Package! 

Contact us today for viewing, booking, or more information.

The 2007 Toyota Hilux Surf is a midsize SUV known for its durability, comfort, and strong off-road capability. It is popular for both city driving and adventure trips.

Key Features

* Engine options:
 • 2.7L petrol
* Transmission:
 • Automatic transmission
* Drive type:
 • 2WD 
~Interior:
 •Spacious cabin with comfortable seats
 •Dual AC and premium interior finish
~Safety:
 •ABS brakes
 •Airbags
 •Stability control on higher trims
~ Performance:
 •Reliable engine performance
 • Strong suspension for rough roads
 •Excellent ground clearance for off-road 

“The 2007 Toyota Hilux Surf combines luxury, durability, and off-road performance. It offers a comfortable interior, powerful engine options, and reliable handling, making it ideal for both daily driving and long-distance travel.”
